hooks.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec uv run --quiet --script "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/claude_otel_hook.py; else exec python3 "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"/hooks/claude_otel_hook.py; fi
